name: markets-watch
description: Custom MCP tool for Yahoo Finance: getQuote returns a symbol's price, day move and key stats.

tools.name: getQuote
tools.description: Returns a ticker's live quote from Yahoo Finance (name, price, day change %, day range, market cap). Pass `symbol` like 'AAPL', 'NVDA', or 'BTC-USD'. Self-contained: if that quote page isn't open it returns {status:"navigate_required", navigateTo}.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is the final result.
